title: Switch story tests to @effect/vitest
description: The CLAUDE.md mandates bun:test, but effect-solutions recommends @effect/vitest for Effect tests (it.effect, TestClock, auto-scope, layer support). Update CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md to permit @effect/vitest for Effect tests while keeping bun:test guidance for non-Effect code, install deps, add vitest config, rewrite stories/11-testing.test.ts, and refresh docs/11-testing.md to flip the recommendation.

title: Write CHANGES.md documenting alignment pass rationale
description: Create docs/CHANGES.md capturing every idiom swap made in the alignment pass: what changed, why, pros, cons, and when the old form is still OK. Format for quick scanning.

title: Align storybook+docs with effect-solutions (keep beta.57 fixes)
description: Rewrite stories 01,02,04,05,06,10,11 + matching docs to adopt effect-solutions idioms (Effect.fn, Schema.Class, Schema.TaggedErrorClass, yieldable errors, defects, Config.schema, layer/testLayer naming, service-driven dev, layer memoization). Preserve our beta.57 corrections — Context.Service, Effect.match (not catchAll), Schedule.both (not intersect).
close_reason: applied effect-solutions alignment while preserving beta.57 corrections; 8 commits pushed

title: Audit storybook + docs against effect-solutions recommendations
description: Cross-check stories/ and docs/ content against effect-solutions guides and the real code under ~/.local/share/effect-solutions/effect. Flag any idioms that drift from official recommendations.

title: Write tutorial docs for each storybook entry
description: Create brief tutorial-style markdown docs under docs/ for each story file (stories/01-..11). Each doc explains the concept, walks through the key code, and points back to the matching tbiz_ts source.

title: Build Effect usage storybook from tbiz_ts patterns
description: Explore /home/ridho/works/tbiz_ts/ Effect usage and create organized storybook-like entries in effectts_hello for learning Effect idioms, best practices, and real-world patterns.

value: effect@4.0.0-beta.57 (effect-smol) differs from the 4.0.0-beta.31 baseline documented in tbiz_ts/EFFECT_V4_MIGRATION.md: (1) ServiceMap module renamed to Context — use Context.Service<Self, Shape>()('id'). (2) Effect.catchAll removed — use Effect.match / Effect.matchEffect / Effect.catchTag instead. (3) Schema.withDecodingDefault takes an Effect<Encoded>, not a thunk — pass Effect.succeed(value). (4) ConfigProvider.fromUnknown does not auto-split env-style underscores — provide nested objects ({DB: {HOST: ...}}) or use ConfigProvider.fromEnv. (5) HttpClient.make validates URLs up-front — even mock clients need absolute URLs. (6) HttpClientRequest.bodyJson returns Effect<Request>, so yield it before passing to execute (or use bodyJsonUnsafe). (7) Schedule.intersect renamed to Schedule.both.
